Economic output per person from 1820 until a year or two after we reach AGI. Once we reach AGI, output will be decoupled from human labor. This graph would need to be 10X higher to show where we will be in 10 years. AGI by the end of this year. We will all be rich.

posts.text: SpaceX has just officially unveiled its AI1 satellite, the first generation of its AI satellite. Overall Specs: • 150 kW peak compute payload • 120 kW average compute payload • 70 kW per ton • Compute provider interchangeable Dimensions: • Wingspan: 70 meters • Deployed height: 2

The Tesla Cybercab is ~3.4 times more efficient than a Waymo I-PACE. The Cybercab is built from the ground up as a Robotaxi. The Waymo is a retrofitted platform with a sensor suite that adds excess weight, drag, and constant compute/sensor power draw.
